mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USER_AUTHENTICATION WHERE LOWER(USER_AUTH_EMAIL) = LOWER(#{value})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS ( USER_NO, USER_TYPE, USER_CREATED_AT, USER_UPDATED_AT, USER_STATUS, USER_NAME, USER_GENDER, USER_PHONENUMBER, USER_REGISTRATION_NO, USER_NICKNAME, USER_PROFILE_IMG ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{userType}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{userStatus}, #{userName}, #{userGender}, #{userPhoneNumber}, #{userRegistrationNo}, #{userNickName}, #{userProfileImg} )

INSERT INTO USER_AUTHENTICATION ( USER_AUTH_NO, USER_NO, USER_AUTH_ID, USER_AUTH_PW, USER_AUTH_EMAIL, USER_AUTH_SNS_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{userAuthNo}, #{user.userNo}, #{user.authId}, #{encodedPassword}, #{user.authEmail}, #{user.authSnsType} )

INSERT INTO USER_ADDRESS ( USER_ADDRESS_NO, USER_NO, USER_ZIP_CODE, USER_BASE_ADDRESS, USER_DETAIL_ADDRESS ) VALUES ( #{userAddressNo}, #{userNo}, #{userZipCode}, #{userBaseAddress}, #{userDetailAddress} )
mapper.select: SELECT u.USER_NO, u.USER_TYPE, u.USER_STATUS, u.USER_NAME, u.USER_GENDER, u.USER_PHONENUMBER, u.USER_REGISTRATION_NO, u.USER_NICKNAME, u.USER_PROFILE_IMG, ua.USER_AUTH_ID AS AUTH_ID, ua.USER_AUTH_PW AS AUTH_PASSWORD, ua.USER_AUTH_EMAIL AS AUTH_EMAIL, ua.USER_AUTH_SNS_TYPE AS AUTH_SNS_TYPE FROM USERS u JOIN USER_AUTHENTICATION ua ON u.USER_NO = ua.USER_NO WHERE ua.USER_AUTH_ID = #{value}
SELECT ua.USER_AUTH_ID FROM USER_AUTHENTICATION ua JOIN USERS u ON ua.USER_NO = u.USER_NO WHERE LOWER(ua.USER_AUTH_EMAIL) = LOWER(#{email}) AND u.USER_STATUS = #{activeStatus}
